title: phyllanthus neorigidus
intro: Phyllanthus neorigidus is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as a type of Phyllanthus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus neorigidus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, capsule, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal properties and potential interactions with other medications.
